title: Malty Gooey Norwegian Monterey Jack Cheese Bake
description: A delicious breakfast dish featuring a malty, gooey crust and a rich Norwegian-inspired Monterey Jack cheese filling, perfect for a lazy Sunday morning.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the Monterey Jack cheese, flaked oats, malted milk powder, unsalted butter, granulated sugar, eggs, heavy cream, salt, and ground cardamom. Mix until well combined.
Transfer the cheese mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Place the baking dish in a large roasting pan and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the dish.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the baking dish from the water bath and continue baking for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the baking dish from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
